race.comment: DOWN UNDER STUNNAH (7) is coming off a 2.25 length defeat over 2030m at Doomben. Missed a whisker here, the one before over the same distance, and finally draws an inside barrier. Sure to prove tough to beat. POWER ACE (1) is a leader who improved beaten 2L over 1650m at Beaudesert, before recording an easy win over 2000m on the Gold Coast poly. Rates well enough with the 3kg claim, but has to skip across from the outside gate. In the premier stable and has winning claims regardless. SACRED BULL (6) gives away starts, but had been threatening a win this distance range before a plain run last time. Thompson is a key jockey switch for the 2kg apprentice, and he will be finishing hard. A gap then to AMALGAMATION (2), who peaks back in grade but he's been struggling to find his best form.
